# Swatch

Color / theme picker rendering a row of clickable tiles. Single or multi-select. Keyboard navigable (horizontal arrows).

## Import

```javascript
import { Swatch } from '@rokkit/ui'
```

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { Swatch } from '@rokkit/ui'
  const colors = [
    { label: 'Red',   value: '#ef4444' },
    { label: 'Blue',  value: '#3b82f6' },
    { label: 'Green', value: '#22c55e' },
  ]
  let value = $state(null)
</script>

<Swatch options={colors} bind:value />
<Swatch options={colors} bind:value multiple shape="circle" />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `options` | `unknown[]` | `[]` | Color/theme items |
| `fields` | `Record<string,string>` | `{}` | Field mapping — `label`, `value`, `fill`, `stroke`, `disabled` |
| `value` | `unknown` (bindable) | — | Selected value(s) — array when `multiple` |
| `multiple` | `boolean` | `false` | Allow multiple selections |
| `shape` | `'square' \| 'circle' \| 'rounded'` | `'square'` | Tile shape |
| `size` | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Tile size |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disable all tiles |
| `label` | `string` | — | Accessible group label |
| `onchange` | `(value) => void` | — | Called on selection change |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | Additional CSS classes |

## Snippets

- `item(proxy, selected)` — Custom tile content

## Related

- [PaletteManager](/llms/components/palette-manager.txt) — full palette config UI using Swatch internally
